title: Shaded Creeping Cloak: session 4ef359 open, landing prior continuity
body: Bootstrap fast-path (no other active claims). Owner direction A->B->C->D for this session. Landing prior-session uncommitted corrections in two commits: chore(sdk-codegen) hash refresh + chore(continuity) corrected handoff. Then dispose 5 under-disposed WS1.5/WS0 reviewer findings (D1, D2, N1, N2, N3) per absorb/re-argue/escalate discipline. Then present WS0 ledger for owner review. Then deep consolidation drain.
